name: 9-Day Grand Tour: Imperial Cities, Sahara & Chefchaouen from Marrakech

seo.title: 9-Day Complete Morocco Tour — Imperial Cities, Sahara & Chefchaouen | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: 9-day grand tour of Morocco from Marrakech: Ait Ben Haddou, Merzouga, Fes (official guide), Volubilis, Chefchaouen, Casablanca, Marrakech city tour. All-inclusive private tour.

hero.tagline: The grand tour of Morocco in 9 days

intro: This grand 9-day tour is the most complete departing from Marrakech: it brings together the main imperial cities, the Sahara desert, the blue city of Chefchaouen and Casablanca. With official guides in Fes and Marrakech, two airport transfers and 8 nights' accommodation, this is the ultimate Morocco experience. Available in French, English, Spanish and Italian.
